org.docgene.writer

Interface DirectoryWriter


  • public interface DirectoryWriter
    This class generates a list of html files (to produce a wiki-like html site) from an input model.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default boolean allowIdenticalTitleIDs()
      Return true if the parser accept identical title IDs.
      default boolean forceAbsoluteLinksFeature()
      Return true if the articles Table of contents must be generated.
      default boolean getFeature(java.lang.String name)
      Return a property value for the writer.
      default boolean getFeature(java.lang.String name, boolean defaultValue)
      Return a property value for the writer.
      ArticlesModel getModel()
      Return the model.
      default boolean isSupportingThemes()
      Return true if the writer support themes.
      default boolean isWritingComments()
      Return true if comments are written.
      default boolean isXHTMLCompliant()
      Return true if the writer will write an XHTML compliant result.
      void setErrorHandler(org.docgene.parser.XMLErrorHandler errorHandler)
      Set the error handler which will be used to create and store errors or informations during the writing.
      default void setFeature(java.lang.String name, boolean value)
      Set a property value for the writer.
      void setModel(java.io.File dir, ArticlesModel model)
      Set the model.
      default boolean setSupportThemes()
      Return true if the writer support themes.
      default void setupFeatures()
      Setup the writer configuration.
      default boolean writeAnyScriptsFeature()
      Return true if the writer can write scripts.
      default boolean writeArticlesHeaderFrame()
      Return true if the articles header frame must be written.
      default boolean writeArticlesTOCFeature()
      Return true if the articles Table of contents must be generated.
      void writeContent()
      Write the wiki content.
      default boolean writeFallback()
      Return true if allowing to write the fallback articles.
      default boolean writeHTMLArticlesFrame()
      Return true if the html articles can be enclosed in frames.
      default boolean writeResourcesFeature()
      Return true if the writer can write resources files.
      default boolean writeScriptsFeature()
      Return true if the writer can write scripts.
      default boolean writeSeeAlsoFeature()
      Return true if the writer can write seeAlso elements.
      default boolean writeSubDirectories()
      Return true if allowing to write articles, resources and images in sub-directories.

    • Method Detail

      • setErrorHandler

        void setErrorHandler(org.docgene.parser.XMLErrorHandler errorHandler)
        Set the error handler which will be used to create and store errors or informations during the writing.
        Parameters:
        errorHandler - the error handler

      • setFeature

        default void setFeature(java.lang.String name,
                        boolean value)
        Set a property value for the writer. Do nothing by default.
        Parameters:
        name - the property name
        value - the property value

      • getFeature

        default boolean getFeature(java.lang.String name)
        Return a property value for the writer. Return false by default.
        Parameters:
        name - name the property name
        Returns:
        the property value

      • getFeature

        default boolean getFeature(java.lang.String name,
                           boolean defaultValue)
        Return a property value for the writer. Return a default value by default.
        Parameters:
        name - name the property name
        defaultValue - the property default value
        Returns:
        the property value

      • writeScriptsFeature

        default boolean writeScriptsFeature()
        Return true if the writer can write scripts. If false, scripts are not allowed but database scripts (such as full text) are allowed.
        Returns:
        true if the writer can write scripts

      • writeAnyScriptsFeature

        default boolean writeAnyScriptsFeature()
        Return true if the writer can write scripts. If false, it means that any scripts are not allowed.
        Returns:
        true if the writer can write scripts

      • writeResourcesFeature

        default boolean writeResourcesFeature()
        Return true if the writer can write resources files.
        Returns:
        true if the writer can write resources files

      • writeSeeAlsoFeature

        default boolean writeSeeAlsoFeature()
        Return true if the writer can write seeAlso elements.
        Returns:
        true if the writer can write seeAlso elements

      • writeArticlesTOCFeature

        default boolean writeArticlesTOCFeature()
        Return true if the articles Table of contents must be generated.
        Returns:
        true if the articles Table of contents must be generated

      • forceAbsoluteLinksFeature

        default boolean forceAbsoluteLinksFeature()
        Return true if the articles Table of contents must be generated.
        Returns:
        true if the articles Table of contents must be generated

      • setSupportThemes

        default boolean setSupportThemes()
        Return true if the writer support themes.
        Returns:
        true if the writer support themes

      • allowIdenticalTitleIDs

        default boolean allowIdenticalTitleIDs()
        Return true if the parser accept identical title IDs.
        Returns:
        true if the parser accept identical title IDs

      • writeSubDirectories

        default boolean writeSubDirectories()
        Return true if allowing to write articles, resources and images in sub-directories.
        Returns:
        true if allowing to write articles, resources and images in sub-directories

      • writeFallback

        default boolean writeFallback()
        Return true if allowing to write the fallback articles.
        Returns:
        true if allowing to write the fallback articles

      • writeArticlesHeaderFrame

        default boolean writeArticlesHeaderFrame()
        Return true if the articles header frame must be written.
        Returns:
        true if the articles header frame must be written

      • writeHTMLArticlesFrame

        default boolean writeHTMLArticlesFrame()
        Return true if the html articles can be enclosed in frames.
        Returns:
        true if the html articles can be enclosed in frames

      • isWritingComments

        default boolean isWritingComments()
        Return true if comments are written.
        Returns:
        true if comments are written

      • isXHTMLCompliant

        default boolean isXHTMLCompliant()
        Return true if the writer will write an XHTML compliant result.
        Returns:
        true if the writer will write an XHTML compliant result

      • isSupportingThemes

        default boolean isSupportingThemes()
        Return true if the writer support themes.
        Returns:
        true if the writer support themes

      • setupFeatures

        default void setupFeatures()
        Setup the writer configuration. It will allow to get the specific parsing and wirting features of the writer. Do nothing by default.

      • setModel

        void setModel(java.io.File dir,
              ArticlesModel model)
        Set the model.
        Parameters:
        dir - the base directory
        model - the articles model

      • getModel

        ArticlesModel getModel()
        Return the model.
        Returns:
        the articles model

      • writeContent

        void writeContent()
           throws org.docgene.writer.DocJWriterException
        Write the wiki content.
        Throws:
        DocJWriterException - thrown if an exception occur when trying to write the content
